scripts.format: node -e "console.error('format is not configured. Configure this validation before relying on pnpm run format.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.error('lint is not configured. Configure this validation before relying on pnpm run lint.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test packages/schemas/test/*.test.mjs packages/redaction/test/*.test.mjs packages/core/test/*.test.mjs packages/providers/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.contract: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.migration-check: node -e "console.error('migration-check is not configured. Configure this validation before relying on pnpm run migration-check.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.smoke: node -e "console.error('smoke is not configured. Configure this validation before relying on pnpm run smoke.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.docs: node -e "console.error('docs is not configured. Configure this validation before relying on pnpm run docs.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
